sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ التَّصْوِيرَ كَثِيرًا فَكَانَ كَامِيرَاتُهُ دَائِمًا مَعَهُ فِي كُلِّ رِحْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo je volio fotografiranje pa je kamera uvijek bila s njim na svakom putovanju.
sentences.translationEn: He loved photography very much and his camera was always with him on every trip.

sentences.translation: Fotografirao je ljude, zgrade i prirodu.
sentences.translationEn: He photographed people, buildings, and nature.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنَ النَّاسِ الإِذْنَ قَبْلَ تَصْوِيرِهِمْ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Uvijek je tražio dozvolu od ljudi prije fotografiranja.
sentences.translationEn: He always asked people for permission before photographing them.

sentences.arabic: نَشَرَ أَحْسَنَ الصُّوَرِ عَلَى حِسَابِهِ فِي الإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Objavio je najbolje fotografije na svom internet profilu.
sentences.translationEn: He posted the best photos on his online account.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «الصُّورَةُ تَحْفَظُ الذِّكْرَى أَفْضَلَ مِنْ أَيِّ كَلَامٍ.»
sentences.translation: Rekao je: "Fotografija čuva sjećanje bolje od ikakvih riječi."
sentences.translationEn: He said: "A photo preserves the memory better than any words."
